app_description: AI-powered meal planning app that turns the daily 'what's for dinner?' stress into a 2-minute solution with smart grocery lists and pantry scanning

ica.target_audience: Parents and busy adults aged 25-45, dual-income households, tech-comfortable but overwhelmed by daily meal decisions
ica.pain_points: Standing in grocery store with no plan, kids rejecting dinner after you spent an hour cooking, throwing away expired food you forgot about, Sunday scaries about the week's meals
ica.desired_outcome: Walk into the kitchen confident about what to make, have groceries actually match meal plans, feel like a competent adult who has their life together
ica.tone: Relatable and slightly chaotic but supportive — 'We've all been there, here's what actually works' with phrases like 'no judgment zone' and 'real life solutions'
ica.hook_style: Pain point callouts that make people go 'literally me' plus bold time-saving claims
ica.platforms: Instagram Stories, Facebook mom groups, Pinterest recipe boards, Reddit parenting communities

content_pillars: Pantry chaos to dinner hero transformations using AI scanning
Grocery store fails vs AI-organized shopping list wins
Kids actually eating meals planned with the kid-friendly filter
Sunday meal prep panic vs 2-minute meal planning demos
Expensive food waste vs smart pantry management

personas.name: Sarah
personas.description: 34-year-old woman with shoulder-length brown hair often in a messy bun, tired but kind hazel eyes, usually wearing comfortable athleisure or wrinkled button-downs, has that perpetually slightly frazzled but trying-her-best energy
personas.image_prompt_prefix: Portrait photo of a 34-year-old woman with brown shoulder-length hair, hazel eyes, slight dark circles showing tiredness, natural skin texture

writing_style.vocabulary: mom brain moments, 'literally cannot even', 'send help', 'why is adulting so hard'
writing_style.humor: laughing to keep from crying, finds comedy in chaos

personas.name: Marcus
personas.description: 29-year-old Black man with a neat fade haircut, warm brown eyes behind stylish glasses, typically in well-fitted casual button-ups or clean hoodies, has that organized millennial energy
personas.image_prompt_prefix: Portrait photo of a 29-year-old Black man with a fade haircut, brown eyes, glasses, natural skin texture

writing_style.tone: solution-focused and slightly nerdy about optimization
writing_style.vocabulary: game-changer, optimization, streamlined, that's fire, lowkey obsessed
writing_style.humor: dry wit about being extra organized

personas.name: Jade
personas.description: 27-year-old Asian woman with long black hair often in a low ponytail, bright dark eyes, usually in cozy oversized sweaters or trendy cropped tops, has that cool girl who's secretly anxious vibe
personas.image_prompt_prefix: Portrait photo of a 27-year-old Asian woman with long black hair, dark eyes, natural skin texture

writing_style.vocabulary: not gonna lie, actually slaps, I'm shook, periodt, this ain't it chief
writing_style.humor: roasting wellness culture while secretly wanting it to work

pricing.free_tier: Basic meal plans, 1 week at a time, limited recipes
pricing.paid_tier: Unlimited plans, pantry scanning, kid-friendly filter, smart grocery lists
pricing.price_note: Cancel anytime. Free trial requires no payment upfront.
